title: CueDeck Deck
description: Canonical CueDeck deck file format. The top-level object is a single Deck, persisted as a `*.cuedeck.json` file. This schema is kept in lockstep with the authoritative TypeScript types in src/shared/types.ts and the shared validator in src/shared/deck.ts.

id.description: Stable unique id for the deck (UUID v4 in practice).

name.description: Human-friendly deck name shown in the picker.

cards.description: Ordered list of cue cards. Order is the demo running order.

schemaVersion.description: Deck schema version. Used for forward migrations.

snippet.description: A labeled blob of text the user copies or drags into the demo target app.

id.description: Stable unique id for the snippet (unique within its card).

label.description: Short label shown on the copy button, e.g. "Test email".

content.description: The actual text placed on the clipboard / dragged out.

cueCard.description: One step/beat in a demo. Holds talking-point notes and 0..N snippets.

id.description: Stable unique id for the card (unique within the deck).

notes.description: Freeform talking points / script for this beat. Plain text (markdown-friendly).

deckVariables.description: Optional named variables (forward-compatible with snippet variable substitution, #7). Flat string→string map; omit entirely when unused.
